full_text:
Liang Qian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Qian. General under Ma Zun, he had a few roles in Jiang Wei’s plans. Liang Qian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom.
